welcome.badge: Ofiife fun gbogbo eniyan · Ko si kaadi kirediti
welcome.subtitle: Ibanirore, awon ero, ati itọnisọna otitọ fun eyikeyi eniyan ti n ṣe nkan pẹlu AI — Afirika, iṣaaju, ati agbaye.
welcome.cta.sub: Ko si iforukọsilẹ lati lo awọn irinṣẹ · Akanti nikan lati fipamọ abajade
welcome.features.title: Ohun gbogbo ti o nilo lati ṣe
welcome.features.subtitle: Awọn irinṣẹ mẹfa. Ile-iṣẹ kan. Gbogbo eefree. Ko si akanti nlo.
welcome.features.opportunity.desc: Ko ẹrọ rẹ kọja — gba itọnisọna ipele marun pẹlu idiyele deede, isọdọtun, irinṣẹ, ati ẹsun iṣe.
welcome.features.chat.desc: Beeere nkan kankan nipa iṣowo, iṣẹ atọka, tabi ẹkọ ọgbọn. Agbari nipasẹ Groq. Owo nla.
welcome.features.studydesk.desc: Iranlowo iṣẹ ile, olupilẹṣẹ ẹkọ, olujẹwọ iwadii, olupilẹṣẹ asọye, ati iṣe koodu — gbogbo ninu ọkan.
welcome.features.devtools.desc: Alaye koodu, irinṣẹ regex, olṣẹ JSON, olupilẹṣẹ README, olukọ SQL, ati alaye API.
welcome.features.global.desc: Yi orilẹ-ede rẹ kọja. Fi owo han ninu owó rẹ. Firanṣẹ awọn irinṣẹ ti o ṣiṣẹ laisi VPN.
welcome.features.income.desc: idiyele osu deede, idi ti nwọn kuna, irinṣẹ. Ko si iroyin. Ko si taja. Oṣuwọn nikan.
chat.title: Kivora AI
chat.subtitle: Agbari nipasẹ Groq · Ofiife
chat.empty.title: Beeere mi nkan kankan
chat.empty.subtitle: Awọn irinṣẹ AI, iṣẹ atọka, sisọ owo, koodu, iwadii — mo ti n ba ẹ.
chat.disclaimer: AI le ṣe aṣiṣe. Jẹrisi alaye pataki.
chat.starter.whatsapp: Bawo ni mo ṣe bẹrẹ iṣowo bot WhatsApp?
chat.starter.saas: Kini ikojọpọ to jẹrẹsi julọ lati ṣe SaaS?
chat.starter.automation: Bawo ni mo ṣe ṣe owo pẹlu iṣẹ atọka AI?
chat.starter.content: Awọn irinṣẹ AI ofiife ti o dara julọ fun iṣẹ akoonu?
chat.starter.freelancing: Bawo ni mo ṣe bẹrẹ iṣẹ ọfẹ pẹlu ọgbọn AI?
study.title: Ile-Ekọ
study.subtitle: Awọn irinṣẹ AI 8 fun awọn ẹlẹkọẹkọ, awọn oniwadii, ati awọn olukọ. Ofiife, ko si akanti nlo.
study.homework.desc: Irankẹrin ti o tẹle ẹsẹ lori eyikeyi koko
study.research.desc: Fi iwe kọja, gba awọn aaye pataki
study.flashcard.desc: Ṣẹda awọn kaadi pẹlu igba tunmọ
study.label.subject: Koko
study.label.question: Ibeere Rẹ
devtools.subtitle: Awọn irinṣẹ AI 23 fun awọn onise, awọn olukọ, ati awọn alatunse. Ofiife. Ko si akanti nlo.
devtools.code_reviewer.desc: Rii awọn aṣiṣe, awọn iṣoro aabo, ati awọn ayipada
devtools.regex.desc: Salaye ni Gẹẹsi, gba akojọpọ naa
devtools.terminal.desc: Salaye tabi ṣẹda awọn aṣẹ shell
devtools.git_helper.desc: Salaye awọn aṣẹ git ati iṣẹ
devtools.json_formatter.desc: Ṣẹ, jẹrisi ati ṣe atẹka JSON
devtools.csv_analyser.desc: Ṣe atẹka data CSV ati pese imọran
devtools.api_analyzer.desc: Ṣe atunṣe ati ṣe ayipada ibeere API
devtools.env_checker.desc: Ṣe ayẹwo faili .env fun iṣoro aabo
devtools.jwt_decoder.desc: Pin ati ṣe ayẹwo awọn tokan JWT
devtools.text_improver.desc: Tun kọ ọrọ fun idiyele ati aṣa
devtools.summariser.desc: Jẹwọ ọrọ gun si awọn aaye pataki
devtools.pitch_writer.desc: Kọ pitch fun onidokoowo tabi alabara
devtools.job_desc.desc: Kọ iṣẹ ti n gba awọn oluyọọda to dara
devtools.cold_email.desc: Kọ imeeli tutu ti n gba idahun
